title: acronia giraffa
side_effects: Acronia giraffa can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, diarrhea, and stomach pain, which can lead to dehydration and electrolyte imbalances. Prolonged use can cause an increased heart rate and blood pressure, potentially resulting in cardiovascular complications. In severe cases, misuse of the acronia giraffa plant can lead to allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using acronia giraffa for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
